name: AnHui Wanyi Science and Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: AnHui Wanyi Science and Technology Co., Ltd. develops and supplies analytical instruments. The company's products include analytical tools about mass spectrometers, chromatography instruments, spectrum instruments, and medical devices. It offers leak detectors, environmental monitoring equipment, and laboratory analysis instruments. The company was founded in 2003 and is based in Hefei, China.
